original_registry_entry.exact_document_title: Mental Health in Emergency Departments: A toolkit for improving care
original_registry_entry.version: Mental Health in EDs Toolkit, last revised April 2023
original_registry_entry.jurisdiction: United Kingdom emergency medicine; UAE law and pathways govern local use
original_registry_entry.population: Adults and children presenting to emergency departments with mental illness, self-harm risk or mental-health crisis.
original_registry_entry.clinical_setting: Emergency mental-health triage, initial assessment, documentation, observation and liaison working.
original_registry_entry.applicability_note: Exact for documenting clinician-performed mental-health triage, current risk, agitation, capacity to leave, prior psychiatric history, mental-state examination, safeguarding and liaison referral. It does not predict future suicide or authorise detention, restraint or treatment in the UAE.

exact_sections.heading: Mental-health audit standards for the emergency department
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting triage, current self-harm or suicide risk, leaving risk, capacity for a decision to leave, prior psychiatric history, mental-state examination and referral or follow-up when performed.

exact_sections.heading: Mental Health Triage and Initial Assessment
exact_sections.evidence_summary: Supports documenting current presenting state, agitation, immediate safety, safeguarding, willingness to accept care, observation level and care-plan status; it explicitly warns triage is not a future-risk prediction tool.

title: Mental Health in Emergency Departments: A toolkit for improving care
jurisdiction: United Kingdom emergency medicine; UAE law and pathways govern local use
population: Adults and children presenting to emergency departments with mental illness, self-harm risk or mental-health crisis.
intended_setting: Emergency mental-health triage, initial assessment, documentation, observation and liaison working.
access_limitations: Algorithm or figure references preserved as locators; diagram structure not interpreted
